title: Penug's Renewables
description: No more non-renewable items!!! (May contain traces of fishing😱)
body:
# `About` The goal of this data pack is to make all of the items on the [Non-renewable Resource](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Non-renewable_resource) Minecraft Wiki page renewable, but not necessarily in ways that are more optimal than the original, non-renewable source. Additionally, I have added new sources for some resources that *are* renewable, but where the renewable source is annoying to farm, such as some items that are renewable through Wandering Traders. # `Items & Sources`
Fished up items: | `SOURCE` | `ITEM(s)` | | ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Fishing in Trial Chambers | - Heavy Core
- Enchanted Book *(Wind Burst I)*
- Music Disc *(Precipice)*
- Music Disc *(Creator)*
- Music Disc *(Creator - Music Box)*
- Flow Pottery Sherd
- Guster Pottery Sherd
- Scrape Pottery Sherd | | Fishing in Ancient Cities | - Echo Shard
- Disc Fragment *(Music Disc 5)*
- Music Disc *(Otherside)*
- Enchanted Book *(Swift Sneak I-III)*
- Diamond Leggings *(Enchanted, 50% chance of Swift Sneak I-III)* | | Fishing at Ruined Portals | - Ancient Debris
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Nether Gold Ore
- Quartz
- Gold Nugget | | Fishing between y=60 and y=1 (Overworld) | All stone ores | | Fishing between y=0 and y=-64 (Overworld) | All deepslate ores | | Fishing in Oceans | - Heart of the Sea | | Fishing anywhere (Junk) | - Dead Bush | | Fishing in Trail Ruins | - Music Disc *(Relic)*
